name: battery_life
description: Duration of power for operation or calls.
examples: The battery life for calls is less than advertised

name: case_charging_capacity
description: Ability of the case to hold additional charges.
examples: the case holds a fair number of charges

name: sound_quality
examples: I love the sound these have

name: device_pairing
description: Ease and success of connecting to other devices.
examples: how well they pair with my iphone
